EditTextPreference.title: Read-only API Key
EditTextPreference.dialogMessage: Create a System-generated, Read-Only API key in Bybit Dashboard → API → Create New Key. Enable permissions: "Bybit Card" (required for the card transaction history endpoint), "Wallet → Account Transfer / Subaccount Transfer" (for the funding wallet balance probe), and "Exchange → Exchange History" (read-only; required by the convert coin-list endpoint that powers the aggregated USD balance). Do NOT enable trading or withdrawal permissions. Paste the API Key here.

EditTextPreference.title: Read-only API Secret
EditTextPreference.dialogMessage: Paste the API Secret that was shown once when you created the API key. The secret is used to sign requests with HMAC-SHA256 and is never sent to Bybit in plain text.

EditTextPreference.title: From what date to load transactions
EditTextPreference.dialogTitle: From what date to load transactions

EditTextPreference.title: Card funding coins
EditTextPreference.dialogMessage: Comma-separated list, e.g. USDT, USDC. The plugin imports one Bybit Card account in USD (bybit_card). The account balance is the Bybit Convert uBalance for these Funding coins plus Funding USD fiat 1:1. Only USDT and USDC are allowed in this list.
